full_text:
Dong Jue (Gongxi) 董厥 (龔襲)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Jue (董厥), styledGongxi (龔襲). Brought troops to defend Saber Pass from Deng Ai and Zhong Hui. Dong Jue was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Dong Jue lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
